---
title: "John Pikachu"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/headshot.png
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
    - icon: youtube
      text: Youtube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<span style="font-size: 20px;">Hi, my name is John Pikachu. Welcome to my page! </span>
 <br><br>

## Education
<span style="font-size: 18px;">
University of British Columbia | Vancouver, BC <br> M.Sc in Computer Science | 2024 - 2026</span>

<span style="font-size: 18px;">
University of British Columbia | Vancouver, BC<br> B.Sc in Computer Science | 2016 - 2021</span><br><br>

## Experience
<span style="font-size: 18px;">
Software Development Engineer | Amazon | 2021 - 2024</span>

<span style="font-size: 18px;">
Product Engineering Inter | Apple | 2021</span>
